glosses.ja: 制限する; 限定する

sentences.target: Wir beschränken uns heute auf Barzahlung.

translations.de: Wir beschränken uns heute auf Barzahlung.
translations.fr: Aujourd'hui, nous acceptons uniquement les paiements en espèces.
translations.vi: Hôm nay chỉ nhận tiền mặt.
translations.nl: Vandaag accepteren we alleen contant geld.
translations.hi: आज हम सिर्फ नकद लेते हैं.
translations.nb: I dag tar vi bare kontanter.
translations.id: Hari ini kami hanya menerima tunai.
translations.da: I dag tager vi kun kontanter.

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person plural nominative; subject of the clause.
Finite lexical verb in the present indicative; agrees with the subject (1PL). In this reflexive construction it means ‘to limit/restrict (oneself)’.
Reflexive personal pronoun (1PL, accusative) co-referential with the subject; required by the reflexive verb phrase ‘sich beschränken (auf …)’.
Temporal adverb modifying the clause; specifies the time frame.
Preposition governing the accusative; part of the fixed pattern ‘sich beschränken auf + Akk’ introducing the target of the limitation.
Compound noun serving as the accusative complement of the preposition ‘auf’; denotes what they limit themselves to.

sentences.target: Viele beschränken die Gästezahl wegen der Kosten.
sentences.reading: /ˈfiːlə bəˈʃʁɛŋkən diː ˈɡɛstət͡saːl ˈveːɡən deːɐ̯ ˈkɔstən/

translations.de: Viele beschränken die Gästezahl wegen der Kosten.
translations.ipa: /ˈfiːlə bəˈʃʁɛŋkən diː ˈɡɛstət͡saːl ˈveːɡən deːɐ̯ ˈkɔstən/
translations.en: Many people limit the number of guests because of costs.
translations.es: Mucha gente limita el número de invitados por los costos.
translations.fr: Beaucoup de gens limitent le nombre d'invités à cause des coûts.
translations.it: Molti limitano il numero degli invitati a causa dei costi.
translations.ko: 많은 사람들이 비용 때문에 손님 수를 제한해요.
translations.zh-Hans: 很多人因为费用而限制来宾人数。
translations.yue: 好多人因為費用而限制賓客人數。
translations.ru: Многие ограничивают число гостей из-за расходов.
translations.pt: Muita gente limita o número de convidados por causa dos custos.
translations.he: הרבה אנשים מגבילים את מספר האורחים בגלל העלויות.
translations.tr: Birçok kişi maliyetlerden dolayı misafir sayısını sınırlandırıyor.
translations.vi: Nhiều người hạn chế số lượng khách vì chi phí.
translations.ar: الكثير من الناس يحدون من عدد الضيوف بسبب التكاليف.
translations.nl: Veel mensen beperken het aantal gasten vanwege de kosten.
translations.uk: Багато хто обмежує кількість гостей через витрати.
translations.hu: Sokan a költségek miatt korlátozzák a vendégek számát.
translations.hi: कई लोग खर्चों की वजह से मेहमानों की संख्या सीमित करते हैं.
translations.pl: Wiele osób ogranicza liczbę gości z powodu kosztów.
translations.el: Πολλοί περιορίζουν τον αριθμό των καλεσμένων λόγω του κόστους.
translations.nb: Mange begrenser antall gjester på grunn av kostnadene.
translations.id: Banyak orang membatasi jumlah tamu karena biaya.
translations.sv: Många begränsar antalet gäster på grund av kostnaderna.
translations.ro: Mulți limitează numărul de invitați din cauza costurilor.
translations.cs: Mnozí kvůli nákladům omezují počet hostů.
translations.da: Mange begrænser antallet af gæster på grund af omkostningerne.
translations.fi: Monet rajoittavat vieraiden määrää kustannusten takia.
translations.ja: 多くの人は費用のために招待客の数を制限しています。

tokens.explanation: Indefinite pronoun functioning as the subject; plural, referring to many people (implicit).
Finite lexical verb in the present indicative; agrees with a plural subject (3PL); means ‘to restrict/limit’.
Definite article determiner for the following noun; here marking accusative singular feminine (direct object).
Compound noun (‘Gäste’ + ‘Zahl’) functioning as the direct object of ‘beschränken’; the thing being limited.
Preposition meaning ‘because of’, typically governing the genitive; introduces the reason.
Definite article in the genitive plural, modifying ‘Kosten’; part of the PP headed by ‘wegen’.
Plural noun (pluralia tantum) as the genitive complement of ‘wegen’; denotes the cause.

sentences.target: Sie beschränken die Lautstärke nach 22 Uhr.
sentences.reading: /ziː bəˈʃʁɛŋkən diː ˈlaʊ̯tˌʃtɛʁkə naːx t͡svaɪ̯ʊntˈt͡svant͡sɪç uːɐ̯/

translations.de: Sie beschränken die Lautstärke nach 22 Uhr.
translations.ipa: /ziː bəˈʃʁɛŋkən diː ˈlaʊ̯tˌʃtɛʁkə naːx t͡svaɪ̯ʊntˈt͡svant͡sɪç uːɐ̯/
translations.en: They limit the volume after 10 p.m.
translations.es: Después de las diez de la noche, bajan el volumen.
translations.fr: Après 22 h, ils baissent le volume.
translations.zh-Hans: 晚上十点以后他们会把音量调低。
translations.yue: 晚上十點之後佢哋會調低音量。
translations.pt: Depois das 22h, eles diminuem o volume.
translations.vi: Sau 22 giờ, họ vặn nhỏ âm lượng.
translations.nl: Na 22.00 zetten ze het volume zachter.
translations.hi: रात 10 बजे के बाद वे आवाज़ धीमी कर देते हैं.
translations.ro: După ora 22, ei dau volumul mai încet.
translations.da: Efter kl. 22 skruer de ned for lyden.

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun in nominative; subject of the clause. Ambiguous between 3rd person plural and formal ‘you’.
Finite lexical verb in the present indicative; agrees with the subject (3PL or formal 2PL); means ‘to restrict/limit’.
Definite article determiner marking accusative singular feminine for the direct object.
Noun serving as the direct object; the property being limited.
Preposition ‘after’, governing the dative; introduces a temporal boundary.
Cardinal numeral modifying the time noun; part of the time expression ‘nach 22 Uhr’.
Noun meaning ‘hour/o’clock’; dative singular as the complement of ‘nach’, forming a temporal PP.

sentences.target: Wir beschränken das Training auf drei Tage.
sentences.reading: /viːɐ̯ bəˈʃʁɛŋkən das ˈtʁeːnɪŋ aʊ̯f dʁaɪ̯ ˈtaːɡə/

translations.de: Wir beschränken das Training auf drei Tage.
translations.ipa: /viːɐ̯ bəˈʃʁɛŋkən das ˈtʁeːnɪŋ aʊ̯f dʁaɪ̯ ˈtaːɡə/
translations.en: We’re limiting training to three days.
translations.es: Limitamos el entrenamiento a tres días.
translations.fr: On limite l'entraînement à trois jours.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们把训练限制在三天。
translations.yue: 我哋將訓練限制喺三日。
translations.pt: Vamos limitar os treinos a três dias.
translations.he: אנחנו מגבילים את האימון לשלושה ימים.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi giới hạn việc tập luyện trong ba ngày.
translations.nl: We beperken de training tot drie dagen.
translations.hi: हम ट्रेनिंग तीन दिन ही करेंगे.
translations.el: Περιορίζουμε την προπόνηση σε τρεις ημέρες.
translations.nb: Vi begrenser treningen til tre dager.
translations.id: Kami membatasi latihan hingga tiga hari.
translations.sv: Vi begränsar träningen till tre dagar.
translations.da: Vi begrænser træningen til tre dage.
translations.ja: トレーニングは3日間に限定します。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person plural nominative; subject of the clause.
Finite lexical verb in the present indicative; agrees with the subject (1PL); ‘to restrict/limit’.
Definite article determiner, accusative singular neuter; marks the direct object.
Noun serving as the direct object of ‘beschränken’.
Preposition governing the accusative; with ‘beschränken’ indicates the target/limit (‘auf + Akk’).
Cardinal numeral modifying ‘Tage’; quantifies the extent of the limitation.
Plural noun as the accusative complement of ‘auf’; completes the PP ‘auf drei Tage’ expressing the limit/duration.
